body: Tom suggested we get dinner with him and Sue Friday after my round. I told him I would check with you. Let me know.
subject: Dinner with Tom and Sue

body: Found a good kids book on the early airmail pilots at the museum shop. Want me to send it for Owen, or bring it when you visit?
subject: Owen book for his birthday

body: The restored B-17 opened this week. Took a few photos I think you would like for reference. I will email them over.
subject: Photos from the B-17 exhibit

body: Can you cover the Thursday morning floor this week? I have an appointment that runs late. Happy to swap a Tuesday for it.
subject: Thursday docent shift

body: The simulator yaw pedal is sticking again. Bring the lubrication kit Tuesday and we will run through it before the weekend crowds.
subject: Simulator kit

body: Are you and Daniel free for a FaceTime Sunday afternoon? Your mother wants to catch up before the week gets busy.
subject: Sunday FaceTime

body: Next time you are out visiting, we should get a round in at Scottsdale National. Early tee time before the heat. Let me know.
subject: Golf in Scottsdale

body: Docent shifts for next month are open. Reply with the Tuesdays and Thursdays you can cover.
subject: Docent schedule sign-up

body: The flight simulator exhibit is back online. New checklist card is taped inside the door.
subject: Simulator exhibit ready for tours

body: Thanks for your gift to the museum. Your year-end receipt is attached for your records.
subject: Your donation receipt

body: School group of 22 arrives Thursday at 9:30. I'll take the hangar tour if you cover the gallery.
subject: Thursday school tour

body: Tee time is 7:10 Saturday. Walt is in. Let me know if Sue is joining for breakfast after.
subject: Saturday round

body: Edits to the docent handbook are in the shared folder. The emergency egress section needed updating.
subject: Handbook revisions

body: Reminder: members preview night is December 5th at 6pm. RSVP at the front desk or reply here.
subject: Members preview night

body: The restored P-51 cockpit photos are up on the site. Worth a look before the gallery opens.
subject: P-51 restoration gallery

body: Confirming your volunteer orientation for Saturday at 10. Park in the south lot and check in with me.
subject: Volunteer orientation Saturday

body: Your annual membership renews this month. The link below keeps your tour benefits active.
subject: Membership renewal

body: Newsletter went out this morning. The spring lecture series dates are on page two.
subject: March newsletter is out

body: Thanks for stepping in last Tuesday. The morning group ran long and you saved me.
subject: Thanks for covering

body: The simulator throttle quadrant is sticking again. Logging it so maintenance has it on Monday.
subject: Simulator maintenance note
